# [CHECKLIST TYPE] Checklist: [FEATURE NAME]

**Purpose**: [Brief description of what this checklist covers]
**Created**: [DATE]
**Feature**: [Link to spec.md or relevant documentation]

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Scope Boundary Quality

- [ ] CHK001 Spec includes both `In Scope` and `Out of Scope` sections
- [ ] CHK002 In-scope outcomes are specific, bounded, and user-value focused
- [ ] CHK003 Out-of-scope exclusions are explicit and enforceable
- [ ] CHK004 Assumptions are documented and do not silently expand scope

## Traceability Quality

- [ ] CHK005 User stories map cleanly to functional requirements
- [ ] CHK006 Planned tasks are traceable to requirement IDs or approved user-story IDs
- [ ] CHK007 Drift findings are categorized (missing-traceability, out-of-scope, dependency-mismatch, ownership-mismatch)
- [ ] CHK008 Deferred or split work includes a follow-up destination

## Decision Auditability

- [ ] CHK009 Realignment decisions are captured in a decision log with owner and timestamp
- [ ] CHK010 Decision rationale is actionable and review-ready
- [ ] CHK011 Traceability and decision artifacts are linked from planning outputs

## Validation Surface

- [ ] CHK012 Local scope validator command is documented and runnable
- [ ] CHK013 Local traceability validator command is documented and runnable
- [ ] CHK014 AI contract and wiki parity checks are documented when contract surfaces change

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
